title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
